visual_description: A close-up of a man’s face, showing his eyes and nose, with visible sweat and dark hair partially covering his forehead. The scene transitions to a wide shot of a car’s silhouette against a twilight sky, with trees and structures visible in the background. The man’s gaze is directed downward, and his posture appears still and contemplative.
